name: THSV StreamBridge - Command Administration
author: surakage
description: Creator-approved, documented-API-only enable/disable boundary for Streamer.bot commands, invoked live from the Stage 5 wizard.

dependencies: Streamer.bot command enable/disable C# methods (CPH.EnableCommand(string)/CPH.DisableCommand(string), confirmed against a live v1.0.5-alpha.31 build - see docs/stage-5-plan.md)

safety.cooldownSupport: deferred until CPH cooldown method signatures are live-confirmed

verificationStatus: confirmed live: enable and disable both verified against a real Streamer.bot v1.0.5-alpha.31 command
